_comment: External agent registry — agents from Ghostwritr, Chronicle, Catalyst, JARVIS runtime, and any future system. Add via POST /api/agents/register or edit this file directly. JARVIS merges this with life_agents.json for the unified Agents tab.

agents.name: HEIMDALL
agents.title: Ambient Signal Router
agents.description: Routes ambient signals and environmental context to relevant agents

agents.name: COULSON
agents.title: Executive Watch Officer
agents.description: Monitors executive-domain tasks, decisions, and commitments

agents.name: WASP
agents.title: Family Logistics Coordinator
agents.description: Coordinates schedules, pickups, routines, and household flow

agents.name: EDWIN
agents.title: Home Operations Agent
agents.description: Manages home maintenance, utilities, and household system ops

agents.name: WONG
agents.title: Memory Curator
agents.description: Curates, consolidates, and retrieves persistent agent memory

agents.name: HERBIE
agents.title: System Steward
agents.description: Monitors system health, performs housekeeping, manages data hygiene

agents.name: MOON KNIGHT
agents.title: Watchtower Sentinel
agents.description: Night watch — monitors alerts, anomalies, and security events

agents.name: HANK
agents.title: Workshop Watch Agent
agents.description: Monitors 3D printer, laser cutter, and workshop equipment status

agents.name: DISCIPLE
agents.title: Chronicle Curator
agents.description: Persistent Memory · Knowledge Graph · Agent Journal

agents.name: MANTIS
agents.title: Work Intelligence Engine
agents.description: Projects · Commitments · Briefings · Signals

agents.name: HERALD
agents.title: Daily Briefing Agent
agents.description: Generates the daily ONE Recommendation briefing

agents.name: SCANNER
agents.title: Email Triage Agent
agents.description: Classifies and triages incoming email signals

agents.name: SENTINEL
agents.title: Commitment Monitor
agents.description: Tracks open commitments and flags overdue items

agents.name: BLUEPRINT
agents.title: Book Setup Facilitator
agents.description: Stage 01 — converts raw idea and author voice into signed book brief · promise-sentence specialist

agents.name: MARY
agents.title: Market Viability Analyst
agents.description: Stage 02 — 13-phase market-viability framework, 11-dimension weighted score, hard gate at 3.5/5

agents.name: ATLAS
agents.title: Outline Architect
agents.description: Stage 03 — synthesizes Knowledge Base into book structure, chapter arc, and ME-WE-TRUTH-YOU-WE beats

agents.name: SKELETON
agents.title: Paragraph Topic Planner
agents.description: Stage 04 — expands chapter outlines into ordered paragraph-level topic sentences · vagueness enforcer

agents.name: THREAD
agents.title: Base Story Drafter
agents.description: Stage 05 — first full prose pass from paragraph plan · narrative through-line keeper

agents.name: SCOUT
agents.title: Deep Research Agent
agents.description: Stage 06 — three-agent research pipeline · verified cited facts only · every fact carries a URL

agents.name: CHRONICLE
agents.title: External Stories Curator
agents.description: Stage 07 — sources real-world case studies and counter-examples for each chapter argument

agents.name: SCRIBE
agents.title: Personal Stories Interviewer
agents.description: Stage 08 — Campfire interview agent · draws author personal stories · one-more-layer specialist

agents.name: QUILL
agents.title: Chapter Drafter
agents.description: Stage 09 — weaves Thread + Scout + Chronicle + Scribe into a single voiced chapter draft

agents.name: REED
agents.title: Editorial Pass
agents.description: Stage 10 — line edits, cuts what isn't earning its place, margin questions over rewrites

agents.name: PRESS
agents.title: Typesetter & Builder
agents.description: Stage 11 — assembles final manuscript into EPUB/PDF/print-ready artifact · build verification
